description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default Docker image of the runner and runs a before_script to update the package list and install python3-pip, then installs pylint via pip3. Define a job called python-sanity-check (which runs in the default stage) that executes the command pylint --disable=R,C,F0001 $(ls -R1 | grep ".py" | grep -v ".py."). No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are configured, so the job runs on every pipeline execution.
